rationale: Section 21 governs notice and hearing requirements before a political subdivision increases total property taxes. Raising the homestead exemption amount does not conflict with these procedural requirements; it reduces taxable value rather than authorizing a tax increase.
quote: the total amount of property taxes imposed by a political subdivision in any year may not exceed the total amount of property taxes imposed by that subdivision in the preceding year unless the governing body of the subdivision gives notice of its intent to consider an increase in taxes and holds a public hearing on the proposed increase before it increases those total taxes.
